messages.subject: [R--gR] gR ToDo list
messages.body_plain:
Dear gR 2002 participants and new R-sig-gR subscribers,

at the end of the gR 2002 workshop we created a ToDo list with a couple
of points to really get the gR project started, which I would like to
send out as a summary reminder.
Best wishes from Vienna,
Z


*******
gR ToDo
*******

* 3 packages => CRAN:
  deal [Claus Dethlefsen]
  "CoCoR" [CoCo port to R by Jens Henrik Badsberg]
  "MIMIR" [MIM Interface for R by Soren Hojsgaard]

* article for R-News [Steffen Lauritzen, deadline: Oct 15]

* DSC 2003 plenary / afternoon [Mar 20-22, 2003 @ Vienna]

* fill gR 2002 web page [everyone, mails to Z]
  started web site
    http://www.ci.tuwien.ac.at/Conferences/gR-2002/Presentations/

* gR mailing list [done, Z is maintainer]

* "Book Project" [to be reassessed at DSC 2003]

* (book or not book:) discussion paper [Steffen Lauritzen together with
  Peter Dalgaard and Peter Green, until Nov 15]

* gR web page [Z, first version done]
    http://www.R-project.org/gR/
  This is just the first version, (constructive) suggestions for
  improvement are very welcome.

* gR CRAN view/manifest maintainer: Claus Dethlefsen [action required
once
  the new repository management tools are up and running]

* link to gR web page from R homepage [FL, done]

* graph wish list to Fritz Leisch ASAP [everyone]

* gR workshop @ DK [Sep 2003, Steffen will organize?]

* collect key algorithms?
